## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who runs into it and when?

## Proposal

A short description of what you would like to see. Include API shapes or
example code if it helps.

```ts
// example usage of the proposed API
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art in other libraries, links to discussions, etc.
